text:
Card: Premium Rewards Plus
Annual Fee: $550
Rewards: dining: 3x points, travel: 5x points, other: 1x points
Benefits: Priority Pass lounge access, Travel insurance up to $500k, Global Entry credit, No foreign transaction fees
Credit Score Required: Excellent (750+)

Card: Everyday Cashback
Annual Fee: $0
Rewards: groceries: 3% cashback, gas: 2% cashback, other: 1% cashback
Benefits: No annual fee, Purchase protection, Extended warranty
Credit Score Required: Good (670+)

Card: Travel Elite Card
Annual Fee: $450
Rewards: travel: 4x points, dining: 3x points, other: 1x points
Benefits: Airport lounge access (Priority Pass), Free checked bags, Travel insurance, Concierge service
Credit Score Required: Excellent (740+)

Card: Student Starter Card
Annual Fee: $0
Rewards: restaurants: 2% cashback, streaming: 2% cashback, other: 1% cashback
Benefits: No annual fee, Build credit history, Student-friendly approval
Credit Score Required: Fair (580+)

Card: Business Pro Card
Annual Fee: $295
Rewards: office_supplies: 5x points, telecom: 3x points, other: 1x points
Benefits: Employee cards at no extra cost, Expense management tools, Business lounge access, Purchase protection
Credit Score Required: Good (680+)
